text: I entered into a written agreement with a supplier for cement and steel for my house construction project. I paid an advance by bank transfer after the supplier promised delivery within 10 days. Even after the agreed time passed, the supplier did not deliver the materials and kept giving excuses such as transport delay and stock shortage. I repeatedly contacted the supplier by phone and WhatsApp, but no final delivery date was given. Because of this delay, my construction work stopped and I suffered labour costs and financial loss. I have not uploaded any documents right now. I want to know my legal position, what claims I may have for breach of contract, refund, compensation, and what documents or evidence I should collect to strengthen my case.

text: I rented an apartment under an 11-month agreement. I paid a security deposit of Rs. 50,000 and regularly paid rent on time. The landlord suddenly asked me to vacate within one week and is now refusing to return my deposit, claiming repair and cleaning charges. He has not shared any bills, inspection report, or written notice. I want to know my legal options to recover the deposit.

metadata.title: User case description

The landlord suddenly asked me to vacate within one week and is now refusing to return my deposit, claiming repair and cleaning charges. He has not shared any bills, inspection report, or written notice. I want to know my legal options to recover the deposit.
